metadata.title: Don’t Expect AI To Disrupt Google’s Monopoly on Search
metadata.description: A judge said artificial intelligence would upend Google’s dominance, but two new books argue that monopolies rarely fix themselves.
metadata.keywords: ALPHABET INC-CL A,Artificial Intelligence,APPLE INC,SAMSUNG ELECTRONICS CO LTD,Justice Department,MICROSOFT CORP,AT&T INC,AMAZON.COM INC,Ben Gilbert,Regulation,weekend-edition,business,review
